Summer School

CeDEx China and the School of Economics at UNNC run two summer school programmes.

Summer School in Mathematical Economics and Financial Econometrics

Audience: Students in Economics, Finance, and related disciplines pursuing advanced study or careers in economics and finance.

Intensive training in analytical and quantitative foundations for economic modelling and financial econometrics.

Programme details and registration

Summer School in Applied Economics - Methods and Data

Audience: Students who want stronger empirical skills and hands-on experience with economic data and methodologies.

Practical methods-focused training with applied projects and data-driven problem solving.

Programme details and registration

To update programme content, edit _data/summer_schools.yml in the repository.
